top_stories.title: Physical Intelligence Team Unveils MEM for Robots: A Multi-Scale Memory System Giving Gemma 3-4B VLAs 15-Minute Context for Complex Tasks
top_stories.description: Current end-to-end robotic policies, specifically Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, typically operate on a single observation or a very short history. This ‘lack of memory’ makes long-horizon tasks, such as cleaning a kitchen or following a complex recipe, computationally intractable or prone to failure. To address this, researchers from Physical Intelligence, Stanford, UC Berkeley, and MIT have […] The post Physical Intelligence Team Unveils MEM for Robots: A Multi-Scale Memory System...
top_stories.author: Asif Razzaq
top_stories.content: Current end-to-end robotic policies, specifically Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, typically operate on a single observation or a very short history. This ‘lack of memory’ makes long-horizon tasks, such as cleaning a kitchen or following a complex recipe, computationally intractable or prone to failure. top_stories.title: Women Leading the Next Era of AI Innovation
top_stories.description: Women leading the next era of AI innovation are driving open ecosystems, ethical AI, and faster innovation beyond closed tech empires. The classic script of technological hegemony was a familiar and imperial trajectory: develop a proprietary base, take the data hostage, and customer-lock in. Winning was having the biggest closed... top_stories.title: Joint Statement from OpenAI and Microsoft
top_stories.description: Microsoft and OpenAI continue to work closely across research, engineering, and product development, building on years of deep collaboration and shared success.
top_stories.content: Microsoft and OpenAI continue to work closely across research, engineering, and product development, building on years of deep collaboration and shared success.

top_stories.title: Azure IaaS series: Explore new resources for building a stronger, more efficient infrastructure
top_stories.description: As organizations accelerate digital transformation, infrastructure decisions increasingly shape how quickly teams can adopt AI, how reliably applications operate at global scale, and how effectively businesses respond to constant change. The post Azure IaaS series: Explore new resources for building a stronger, more efficient infrastructure appeared first on Microsoft Azure Blog.
